Describe the symptom without private data.

## Sanitized observations

Use placeholders instead of local paths, hostnames, or transcripts.

## What you already checked

- [ ] Backups created
- [ ] Data preserved
- [ ] Logs redacted
- [ ] No private transcripts attached

## Notes

Do not paste secrets, transcripts, private paths, or raw logs.
